name: White Turkey Chili
recipeIngredient: 19 ounces cannellini beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook onions, bell peppers, and garlic in oil until tender.
2. Add cumin, oregano, cayenne pepper, and salt.
3. Cook for 1 minute.
4. Stir in beans and turkey.
5. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer (uncovered) for 30 minutes or until slightly thickened.
